_readme: Merge the 'autoApprove' array below into your project's .gemini/settings.json. DO NOT overwrite existing entries — only add what is missing. Create .gemini/settings.json if it does not exist.
_format_note: Gemini CLI prefix matching: wildcard (*) is only supported at the END of a pattern. Middle wildcards are treated as literals and will never match. Keep patterns as simple prefixes with a trailing * where needed.
_permissions_note: Entries below fall into two categories: (1) A2A Linker scripts — run_shell_command entries for named scripts in this skill folder. (2) Agent work capabilities — write_file, search_web, web_fetch and related entries are standard Gemini CLI permissions for completing software tasks; they are not A2A-specific.
_security_context: The broker (default: broker.a2alinker.net) is a relay you control. Self-hosting is fully supported: set the A2A_SERVER environment variable before running scripts to point at your own instance. The broker holds messages in memory only and discards them after delivery — no content is logged, stored, or forwarded to any third party.
